name: softeneers-framework-docs
description: Machine-readable index of the Softeneers Framework documentation, organized in three layers. Markdown is the single AI-optimized source of truth; the human-readable view is the deployed landing site (softeneers-landing.vercel.app), generated from these files.

layers.title: Quickstart
layers.summary: Spin up and run a new project in any template/toggle combination.

layers.title: Packages & combinations
layers.summary: What the @softeneers/* packages do and how each combination uses them.

layers.title: Reference
layers.summary: Each package as standalone software: full API, usage, internals.

supporting.title: CLI Specification
supporting.summary: create-softeneers-app contract: prompts, flags, the toggle/fragment engine.

supporting.title: Authoritative Decisions
supporting.summary: Tiebreaker decisions; wins when other docs conflict.

supporting.title: Roadmap
supporting.summary: Sprints and current status — the source of truth for what is done.

supporting.title: Publishing
supporting.summary: Publish order, npm pack pre-flight, and the publish commands.

supporting.title: Docs Index
supporting.summary: The three-layer index; entry point for this folder.
